scripts.build: prisma generate --schema=task-app/server/prisma/schema.prisma && cd task-app/task-app-client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../.. && rm -rf public dist build && mkdir public dist build && cp -r task-app/task-app-client/build/client/* public/ && cp -r task-app/task-app-client/build/client/* dist/ && cp -r task-app/task-app-client/build/client/* build/ && cp -r task-app/task-app-client/build/client/* .
